characters.name: Alejandra Parev
characters.description: Alejandra ParevBirth:June 21, 1985Age:36Address:1392 Lovelink St., San Francisco, CaliforniaOccupation:MomagerFriends:Lola Wong,Jackson Fuller,Max Fuller,Bobby PopkoRockiEthanInterests:Shopping, cooking, being a momFirst appearance:Our Very First Show, AgainLast appearance:Our Very Last Show, AgainPortrayer:Kimmy JonesAlejandra Parev(born June 21st, 1985) is a character portrayed onFuller House. Alejandra is the best friend ofKimmy Gibbler. She is 36 years old at the beginning ofseason 1ofFuller House. She is best known for being a "crazy Momager" to her daughter, Zanella. She can usually be found running around with a cellphone to her ear making appointments for her young, model daughter. She is best known for being a "crazy Momager" to her daughter, Zanella. She can usually be found running around with a cellphone to her ear making appointments for her young, model daughter.

characters.name: Aaron Bailey
characters.description: Aaron BaileyBirth:December 1, 1986Address:San FranciscoOccupation:StudentFriends:Dave the ParrotSammy the Parrot (Preschool only)Education:Meadowcrest PreschoolFrasier Street Elementary SchoolFirst appearance:Bye, Bye BirdieLast appearance:Dateless in San FranciscoPortrayer:Miko Hughes Aaron BaileyisMichelle's recurring classmate. He is the typical class bully, who tends to be annoying and rude (especially towards the members in the Tanner household) at times. He pinches Michelle in theseason fourepisode "A Pinch for a Pinch" when they are in preschool, andJessetells Michelle to fight back. When the teacher gives them both a time-out, Jesse takes Michelle home. While that behavior is discontinued, his obnoxious ways do continue throughout the series. Eventually, Aaron becomes Michelle’s frenemy and his rude ways continue. In "I've Got a Secret", he does not want to swallow his pride and admit that he likes Michelle (until Lisa gives him an elbow in the ribs).

characters.name: Jake Bitterman
characters.description: Jake BittermanAddress:San Francisco, CaliforniaFriends:Kimmy GibblerInterests:Kimmy GibblerFirst appearance:13 CandlesLast appearance:Girls Just Wanna Have FunPortrayer:Christian GuzekJake Bittermanis a recurring character onFull House, played by Christian Guzek. Jake isKimmy's first boyfriend. He first appears in "13 Candles" and his last appearance is "Girls Just Wanna Have Fun". In his second appearance, "Good News, Bad News", he calls outD.J.'s hiring of Kimmy for the school paper as "nepotism" despite the fact that both are related by water and not blood.

However, at the wedding C.J. finds out Steve is actually in love with D.J.

She is first seen in the episode "Terror in Tanner Town", when it is revealed that she works as a dry cleaner. She first meets Danny when he is a customer at her store. She also has a precocious 10-year-old son namedRusty.

characters.name: Claire Mahan
characters.description: Claire MahanBirth:August 14, 1956Occupation:WaitressFamily:Gia Mahan(daughter)Rocki Mahan(granddaughter)Matt Harmon(son-in-law) (Fuller House)Friends:Danny TannerFirst appearance:Making Out is Hard to DoLast appearance:Claire and Present DangerPortrayer:Andrea AbbateClaire Mahanis the mother ofGia Mahan, portrayed by Andrea Abbate. Claire was born on August 14, 1956 in Fresno, California. She got married in 1976 to her husband and had her only child, Gia, on December 19, 1980. She and her husband divorced in 1990. Claire works at a diner. She and Gia live together in an apartment complex.

characters.name: Claire Tanner
characters.description: Claire TannerBirth:December 30, 1932Address:Tacoma, Washington; San Francisco, CaliforniaImmediate Family:see:FamilyDanny Tanner(son)Wendy Tanner(daughter)Friends:Irene KatsopolisMindy GladstoneInterests:Art, cooking, cleaningFirst appearance:Our Very First ShowLast appearance:Granny TannyPortrayer:Alice Hirson(season 1)Doris Roberts(season 3)Claire Tanneris a fictional character onFull House(portrayed by Alice Hirson [season 1],Doris Roberts[season 3, pictured]).DannyandWendy Tanner'smother. She was the one who was there for Danny in the first few months after Danny's wife,Pamdied, temporarily living in the house with them. She helped Danny care for the girls. The day she moved out was the day thatJesseandJoeymoved in. She is also divorced. She came back in the episode, "The Return of Grandma", so she could check up on Danny, Jesse, and Joey to see how they were doing with the girls. To her surprise, the place was a mess. Jesse and Joey expected her to clean the whole house since she was there, and went out to catch a movie. When they came back, Danny informed them about what Claire said—that she wanted them to clean up their mess. She brought in Jesse and Joey's mothers,Mindy GladstoneandIrene Katsopolis. They offered to move in, which seemed more like a threat to the guys. She, Mindy, and Irene made a deal with Danny, Joey, and Jesse—if all three guys could clean up the house in a few hours' time, they would not move in. If they failed in cleaning the house in a few hours, they could move in. Claire and the others were surprised to see the house so clean after a few hours. In the episode, "The Miracle of Thanksgiving", it was revealed she lived in Tacoma, Washington, after Danny told Jesse and Joey that Claire was getting snowed in, so she couldn't cook a special Thanksgiving dinner for Danny, Jesse, Joey, and the girls.

If they failed in cleaning the house in a few hours, they could move in. Claire and the others were surprised to see the house so clean after a few hours. Mindy Gladstone(ex-wife) Colonel Gladstone was born on January 21, 1928 and during his youth, he fought in World War II and earn the rank of colonel and after the war he would marryMindy Gladstoneand on September 21, 1958, they would have a son namedJoey Gladstone.

characters.name: Comet
characters.description: CometSex:MaleSpecies:DogBreed:Golden RetrieverBirth:1989Owner(s):Tanner familyAncestry:Minnie(mother, deceased)Descendants:Comet Jr.(child)Comet Jr. Jr.(granddaughter)Comet Jr. Jr. Jr.(great-granddaughter)Cosmo(great-grandson)see:Family treeFriends:D.J. TannerStephanie TannerMichelle TannerJesse KatsopolisDanny TannerJoey GladstoneRebecca DonaldsonNicky KatsopolisAlex KatsopolisTeddyFirst appearance:And They Call It Puppy LoveLast appearance:Michelle Rides Again (Part 2)Portrayer:Comet, Buddy[1][2] Cometis an adorable Golden Retriever who was introduced on the show in season three. He was born to a dog namedMinnie. He debuted in theseason threeepisode "And They Call It Puppy Love". Comet's mother, Minnie, ran away from her home and somehow ended up in the Tanners' backyard while she was pregnant. She gave birth to a litter of puppies onJesse's bed. Her owner, Frank Flood arrived to get her shortly after she gave birth and was so grateful that the household had taken such good care of her and her puppies, he allowed them to keep one. After Joey convinced Danny to let them have a puppy, D.J. toldMichelleto pick which one they would keep, so she picked the one Jesse was holding and they named him "Comet" (after shooting down Michelle's suggestion it be named after her, and Stephanie's suggestion it be named 'Mr. Dog' afterMr. Bear). By the end of season three, Comet had fully grown to the full size of an average Golden Retriever, something D.J. mentions to Michelle in theseason fourepisode "One Last Kiss". Michelle was trying to keepSparky, saying that Comet was already too big for her, but D.J. mentions that pets like Comet grow much faster than humans like them. She goes on to explain that Comet has already stopped growing, and when Michelle stops growing soon, it will seem that he is getting smaller while she is getting bigger, even though in reality he's (roughly) the same size she is.

characters.name: Comet Jr. Jr.
characters.description: Comet Jr. Jr.Family:Minnie(great-grandmother; deceased)Comet(grandfather; deceased)Comet Jr.(parent)Comet Jr. Jr. Jr.(daughter)Cosmo(son)Friends:Steve Hale(owner)Max FullerJackson FullerD.J. Tanner-Fuller(veterinarian)Matt Harmon(veterinarian)Stephanie TannerKimmy GibblerFirst appearance:Our Very First Show, AgainLast appearance:Ramona's Not-So-Epic PartyComet Jr. Jr.isSteve Hale's pet Golden Retriever onFuller House. As her name suggests, she is a descendant ofComet, and ultimatelyMinnie. It is unknown how Comet Jr. Jr. came to be adopted bySteve, but he definitely loves her very much. Toward the end of theFuller Houseseries premiere, "Our Very First Show, Again," Steve rushes over to theTanner Housein a panic after having been up all night trying to help her through labor. She gives birth to her litter in the backyard there, and her puppies include Comet Jr. Jr. Jr., as well asCosmo, both of which are named byMax. She is seen again in the episode "Ramona's Not-So-Epic Party," when Steve picks her up from Harmon Pet Care after she has a post-delivery check-up from Dr.Matt Harmon.

characters.name: Comet Jr. Jr. Jr.
characters.description: Comet Jr. Jr. Jr.Age:28 weeksFamily:Minnie(great-great-grandmother) (deceased)Comet(great-grandfather) (deceased)Comet Jr.(grandfather)Comet Jr. Jr.(mother)Cosmo(younger brother)Friends:Steve Hale(owner)Max FullerD.J. Tanner-Fuller(veterinarian)Matt Harmon(veterinarian)Stephanie TannerFirst appearance:Our Very First Show, AgainPortrayer:MoanaComet Jr. Jr. Jr.is one of the puppies inSteve Hale's pet Golden Retriever,Comet Jr. Jr.'s litter onFuller House. As her name suggests, she is a descendant ofComet, and ultimatelyMinnie, as well as being a sibling of the Fuller family dog,Cosmo.  Comet Jr. Jr. Jr. is one of the puppies in the litter Comet Jr. Jr. gives birth to in the backyard of theTanner House. She is the fourth generation of Comet-named dogs in her family line, and was the first puppy born in her litter. She was present at Harmon Pet Care whenMaxwas deciding which puppy to choose, but was ultimately passed over in favor of Cosmo. "Jr. Jr. Jr." was named by Max in his bid to convinceD.J.to allow him to have a puppy, as a continuation ofSteve Hale's unconventional naming tradition, and would otherwise be considered Comet IV.

characters.description: Connie Jane DonaldsonBirth:March 5th, 1966Age:58Address:Valentine, NebraskaOccupation:English teacher (retired)Nickname(s):ConFamily:Kenneth Donaldson (father)Nedra Donaldson (mother)Frank Anderson (ex-husband)Howard Anderson (son)Leanna Davis (daughter)Rebecca Donaldson (sister)Corky Donaldson (brother)Jesse Katsopolis (brother-in-law)Nicky Katsopolis (nephew)Alex Katsopolis (nephew)Pamela Katsopolis (adoptive niece)Interests:TravellingEducation:Private girl’s high schoolConnie Jane Donaldsonis the unseen sister ofRebecca Donaldson-KatsopolisandCorky Donaldson. She is the youngest child ofKennethandNedra Donaldson. Connie is a divorced traveller and mother. Nedra Donaldson (mother)Frank Anderson (ex-husband)Howard Anderson (son)Leanna Davis (daughter)Rebecca Donaldson (sister)Corky Donaldson (brother)Jesse Katsopolis (brother-in-law)Nicky Katsopolis (nephew)Alex Katsopolis (nephew)Pamela Katsopolis (adoptive niece) Connie has never been seen in the full/fuller house series and will most likely remain that way.

characters.name: Corky Donaldson
characters.description: Corky DonaldsonFamily:Kenneth Donaldson(father)Nedra Donaldson(mother)Rebecca Donaldson Katsopolis(sister)Connie Donaldson(sister)Corky Donaldsonis the never-seen but mentioned younger brother ofRebecca Katsopolis. He was first mentioned in the season two episode "Tanner vs. Gibbler", when Becky says thatJessereminds her of her little brother Corky who also does Elvis impressions. Becky:  You know this is gonna sound weird, but you remind me of someone.Jesse:  Oh yeah. Who is that?Becky:  It's silly. You don't want to hear it.Jesse:  No go ahead.Becky:  No it's ridiculous.Jesse:  People tell me all the time. Go ahead. Come on pretty mama lay it on me.Becky:  You remind me of Corky.Jesse:  Yeah see. . people tell me. . . Corky?Becky:  My little baby brother. You know he used to do that same cute Elvis voice.Jesse:  I remind you of your little baby brother?Becky:  Yeah. It's uncanny. Corky and I would go up to the pond and he would always say, "Come on little froggy mama".Jesse:  Elvis never said that.

characters.name: Brett Davis
characters.description: Brett DavisBirth:December 6, 1982Address:San FranciscoOccupation:StudentFriends:Stephanie TannerInterests:BaseballEducation:Unknown. Possibly Frasier Street ElementaryFirst appearance:Stephanie Plays the FieldLast appearance:Stephanie Plays the FieldPortrayer:Sean FoxBrettis a fictional character onFull House. He is a classmate and friend ofStephanie's who plays Little League Baseball for the Cubs. D.J.teases Stephanie about her interest in Brett, such as when Stephanie clenches her heart, and says that her heartbeat feels like "Brett-Brett, Brett-Brett". In the episode "Stephanie Plays the Field", Brett shows off his baseball bat with "ST" and a heart drawn around it, and asks Stephanie to go easy on him with the "Tanner Twister", a method of pitching created by Stephanie and her father,Danny. Though she struck him out later in that episode, she thinks he is mad at her. Brett said he would have done the same thing. They still remained boyfriend and girlfriend, although he is never mentioned again after that episode.

They still remained boyfriend and girlfriend, although he is never mentioned again after that episode.

characters.name: Denise Frazer
characters.description: Denise FrazerBirth:October 13, 1986Address:San Francisco, CaliforniaOccupation:StudentFamily:Little Richard (uncle)Friends:TeddyMichelle TannerPet(s):-Interests:Horse-back RidingEducation:Frasier Street Elementary SchoolFirst appearance:Girls Will Be BoysLast appearance:A House DividedDenise Frazeris a recurring character onFull House, played byJurnee Smollett. She is a good friend ofMichelle's. Denise would eventually be the one who replacesTeddyafter he moves to Texas. After appearing briefly in "Girls Will Be Boys", she becomes a regular character in "The Long Goodbye", after being transferred into Michelle's class. Denise, like Teddy before her, becomes Michelle's "partner in crime", and accompanies Michelle whenever she has an idea. In the episode "Be Your Own Best Friend", Teddy moves back to San Francisco, leaving Michelle to choose between him and Denise for whom to portray as her best friend. At the end of the episode, Danny makes her understand that it is possible to have more than one best friend. Michelle, Teddy, and Denise all become each other's best friends. In "Too Little Richard Too Late", Denise reveals thatLittle Richardis her uncle. When he comes to the Tanners' house to pick her up, Joey convinces him to perform at his campaign rally to be elected President of the Frasier Street Elementary School PTA.

characters.name: Derek Boyd
characters.description: Derek S. BoydBirth:December 23, 1986Address:San Francisco, CaliforniaOccupation:Singer, studentFamily:Mrs. Boyd (Mother)Friends:Michelle Tanner,Denise Frazer,Lisa Leeper,Aaron BaileyInterests:Singing, Dancing, Acting, SchoolFirst appearance:The Play's the ThingLast appearance:Our Very Last Show, AgainPortrayer:Blake McIver Ewing Tickets are sold out for Sammy Starfish's concert and Oswald must find a way to see the show. Derek S. Boydis one of Michelle's friends later in the series. He appears in nine episodes throughout seasons six through eight. Michelle first meets Derek in the episode "The Play's the Thing", when he gets the role of Yankee Doodle in their school playAmerica the Beautiful. Though Michelle is initially jealous of Derek for winning the part over her (due in no small part to the fact that both of her sisters played "Yankee Doodle"), she helps him recover from stage fright, and they eventually become friends. Derek is very educated and well-spoken for a boy of his age, though also a bit on the wimpy side. He also shows signs of being a bit obsessive-compulsive. As shown in several episodes, he is also a very talented singer. He says he blends in with his surroundings.

characters.name: Dick Donaldson
characters.description: Dick DonaldsonBirth:Omaha, NebraskaAge:30sAddress:Nebraska USAOccupation:Fast food ownerNickname(s):Dickey(by Donna)Immediate Family:see:FamilyDonna Donaldson(wife)Debbie Donaldson(daughter)Darla Donaldson(daughter)Friends:Danny TannerJoey GladstoneD.J. TannerStephanie TannerMichelle TannerInterests:Family, farmingFirst appearance:Trouble in Twin TownLast appearance:Trouble in Twin TownPortrayer:Mark Linn-BakerDick Donaldsonis a minor character onFull House. He is the cousin ofRebecca Katsopolis, the husband ofDonna Donaldson, and the father ofDebbie and Darla. He appears in "Trouble in Twin Town" as the main antagonist where Jesse hates him and his wife, because Dick thinks that he has better twins than Rebecca and Jesse and wishes Rebecca married someone richer than Jesse, specifically Doyce Plump. Jesse got back at Dick by winning the twins contest dressing Nicky and Alex like Elvis, much to Dick's dismay. Dick Donaldson was played byMark Linn-Baker, who is probably best known for playing Larry Appleton in the seriesPerfect Strangers. LikeFull House(andFuller House),Perfect Strangerswas a sitcom from Miller-Boyett Productions – along withFamily Matters, on which he also made a guest-starring appearance. He also directed episodes ofFamily Matters,Step by Step, and 35 episodes ofHangin' with Mr. Cooper.

characters.name: Duane Moffat
characters.description: Duane MoffatBirth:June 30, 1977Occupation:Plumber(Full House)Motivational Speaker(Fuller House)Friends:Kimmy GibblerInterests:ShakespeareFirst appearance:Taking the PlungeLast appearance:DJ and Kimmy's High School ReunionPortrayer:Scott MenvilleDuane MoffatisKimmy Gibbler's boyfriend inseason eightofFull House(portrayed by Scott Menville). He does not talk much to Kimmy, or anyone else for that matter. His recurring phrase (to the point of annoyance) is "Whatever". He does not care about many things, except Shakespeare, which he quotes soulfully. He is very easygoing. He even agrees to marry Kimmy. They almost get married at the Create-Your-Own-Wedding Chapel. InFuller House, Duane makes an appearance in the episode "DJ and Kimmy's High School Reunion", where he uses his skills as a motivational speaker to help Kimmy overcome all of her embarrassments from that evening. Kimmy:Duane here is a Shakespeare freak! Aren't you, my little Hamlet-and-Cheese?Duane:(Chuckles) Whatever.D.J.:Duane, you're into Shakespeare?Duane:Shall I compare thee to a Summer's day? Thou art more lovely and more temperate. Rough winds do shake the darling buds of May, and Summer's lease hath all too short a date.D.J:Wow, Duane, I had no idea you had such a sensitive soul.Duane:(Voice cracks) Whatever.

characters.name: Fernando Guerrero
characters.description: Fernando GuerreroBirth:November 10, 1976Occupation:Race car driver(retired)Immediate Family:see:FamilyNadia Guerrero(mother)Kimmy Gibbler(wife)Ramona Gibbler(daughter)Interests:Racing, hairdressingFirst appearance:Our Very First Show, AgainLast appearance:Our Very Last Show, AgainPortrayer:Juan Pablo Di PaceFernando Hernandez-Guerrero-Fernandez-Guerrerois a character onFuller Houseportrayed byJuan Pablo Di Pace, and appeared in 69 of the 75 episodes. He is the ex-husband and fiancé ofKimmy Gibbler, and the father ofRamona Gibbler. Fernando married Kimmy sometime after theFull Houseseries finale, "Michelle Rides Again (Part 2)". They got married right before Ramona was born. he cheated on Kimmy multiple times with some of the most beautiful women in the world. Fernando is still in love with Kimmy and is engaged to marry her for a second time.

characters.name: Carrie Fowler
characters.description: Carrie FowlerBirth:1963Friends:Jesse KatsopolisEducation:Golden Bay High SchoolFirst appearance:One Last KissLast appearance:One Last KissPortrayer:Erika EleniakCarrie Fowleris one ofJesse Katsopolis' ex-girlfriends. Her lifelong dream was to become a model. She and Jesse had a strong, serious relationship. It's unknown how long Carrie and Jesse were dating, but they were in love with each other. Carrie told Jesse she would come on the road with his band. The day before high school graduation, she sat Jesse down to talk to her. She had previously sent her pictures to a modelling agency, and they loved them. She wanted to go her own way, to continue her dreams of becoming a model. Jesse, angry that she would break her word, didn't want her to go. They got into a fight involving their priorities, and realized they were breaking up. They didn't want to, so they came to a compromise—Jesse would do his music, and Carrie would do her modeling. When she came back, they would pick up right from where they left off.
